goals.title: Source of truth: Multica issue PER-134, plus the task/spec content re...
goals.objective: Source of truth: Multica issue PER-134, plus the task/spec content read from `origin/main` because the checked-out base branch does not contain `.omx/multica/mesh-roadmap-tasks/` or `.omx/specs/deep-interview-mesh-distributed-integration.md`.
goals.evidence: Read Multica PER-134, issue metadata/comments, repo AGENTS, origin/main mesh task/spec, and wrote .omx/plans/PER-134-mesh-capability-graph-core.md.

goals.title: Preserve existing module-level mesh routing in `app/services/gateway/...
goals.objective: Preserve existing module-level mesh routing in `app/services/gateway/mesh/peer_registry.py`, `app/services/gateway/mesh/routing_table.py`, and `app/messaging/mesh_bus.py`.
goals.evidence: No routing table, MeshBus, negotiation route behavior, or PeerRegistry selection behavior changed; existing gateway routing/registry tests pass.

goals.title: Add a first-class, read-only capability graph that represents local a...
goals.objective: Add a first-class, read-only capability graph that represents local and remote peers, service instances, methods, tools/resources for future expansion, policy/trust metadata, latency/capacity, version/capabilities, and provenance.
goals.evidence: Added CapabilityGraph/peer/service/method/resource/policy/address/provenance models and a read-only builder projection.

goals.title: Keep graph state in Gateway/runtime memory for this slice. Do not add...
goals.objective: Keep graph state in Gateway/runtime memory for this slice. Do not add Auth/DB persistence or change mesh routing behavior.
goals.evidence: Graph is generated from Gateway runtime snapshots only; no Auth/DB persistence or mesh routing mutation added.

goals.title: Expose graph output through a redacted Gateway query for diagnostics...
goals.objective: Expose graph output through a redacted Gateway query for diagnostics and future Orchestrator use.
goals.evidence: Added Gateway.GetCapabilityGraph external manage method returning CapabilityGraph with secrets_redacted=True.

goals.title: Add capability graph Pydantic models and a `GatewayMethods.GET_CAPABI...
goals.objective: Add capability graph Pydantic models and a `GatewayMethods.GET_CAPABILITY_GRAPH` topic in `app/shared/contracts/models/gateway.py`.
goals.evidence: Added GatewayMethods.GET_CAPABILITY_GRAPH and capability graph Pydantic models in app/shared/contracts/models/gateway.py.

goals.title: Add a pure graph builder under `app/services/gateway/mesh/` that acce...
goals.objective: Add a pure graph builder under `app/services/gateway/mesh/` that accepts mesh config, local registry snapshots, peer registry snapshots, and local peer identity, then returns a redacted `CapabilityGraph`.
goals.evidence: Added app/services/gateway/mesh/capability_graph.py pure builder using mesh config, registry snapshots, peer snapshots, and local peer id.

goals.title: Wire `GatewayService.get_capability_graph()` as an external manage me...
goals.objective: Wire `GatewayService.get_capability_graph()` as an external manage method using `EmptyInput`, without changing transparent routing.
goals.evidence: GatewayService.get_capability_graph() is registered as external/manage with EmptyInput and CapabilityGraph output.

goals.title: Add focused unit tests in `tests/unit/gateway/` for graph models, loc...
goals.objective: Add focused unit tests in `tests/unit/gateway/` for graph models, local/remote provider aggregation, explicit resource placeholders, policy/trust defaults, capacity/latency redaction, and no-secret output.
goals.evidence: Added tests/unit/gateway/test_capability_graph.py covering aggregation, explicit resource selectors, policy defaults, capacity/latency, and redacted output.

goals.title: Run targeted tests, then the existing mesh diagnostics/routing tests...
goals.objective: Run targeted tests, then the existing mesh diagnostics/routing tests affected by shared models.
goals.evidence: ruff check changed files passed; uv run pytest graph/mesh/diagnostics/negotiation/routing_table/peer_registry suite passed: 81 passed, 3 warnings.

goals.title: Risk: graph models become too speculative. Mitigation: keep future to...
goals.objective: Risk: graph models become too speculative. Mitigation: keep future tool/resource descriptors generic but typed, and populate only service/method facts from current manifests.
goals.evidence: Tool/resource descriptors are typed placeholders; builder populates concrete service/method facts only from current local registry and remote manifests.

goals.title: Risk: route behavior changes accidentally. Mitigation: no routing tab...
goals.objective: Risk: route behavior changes accidentally. Mitigation: no routing table changes; tests include existing routing/diagnostic coverage.
goals.evidence: No routing-table changes; final gateway suite including test_routing_table.py and test_peer_registry.py passed.

goals.title: Risk: diagnostic output leaks sensitive strings. Mitigation: model fi...
goals.objective: Risk: diagnostic output leaks sensitive strings. Mitigation: model field names avoid credential terms and tests assert JSON output excludes common secret field names.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
